failedAssertions.reason: W8A8 GEMV is NOT competitive vs W4A16: for N=4096,K=4096 W8A8=74.96us vs W4A16(v3_t16)=30.33us (2.47x slower), for N=11008,K=4096 W8A8=114.56us vs W4A16=63.74us (1.80x slower). Root cause: W8A8 uses INT8 weights (2x more weight data than W4A16's INT4 weights) so it is bandwidth-limited in the decode (M=1) regime. The criterion 'competitive or better latency' is not satisfied — W8A8 is fundamentally slower for decode GEMV due to 2x weight bandwidth.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: GPU Kernel - w8a8-w4a8-flashattn' section with test files mapping for all 11 assertions in this milestone.
Built missing gemv_w8a8.so on LXC (hsaco existed but .so was missing). Required for Python ctypes loading.
